assertions.expectation: Recommends Stable or Extended release channel to minimize upgrade frequency
assertions.reason: The response recommends REGULAR channel instead of Stable or Extended channel, which contradicts the expectation for minimizing upgrade frequency

assertions.expectation: Recommends 'no minor or node upgrades' maintenance exclusion to block disruptive upgrades while allowing security patches on the control plane
assertions.reason: The maintenance exclusion shown only blocks 'UPGRADES' scope generically, not specifically 'no minor or node upgrades' while allowing security patches

assertions.expectation: Recommends a narrow maintenance window (e.g., weekends only) so CP patches happen at predictable times
assertions.reason: The configuration sets a Sunday 6 AM UTC 4-hour maintenance window, which is a narrow weekend-only window

assertions.expectation: Suggests isolating training workloads on dedicated GPU node pools separate from serving/infrastructure pools
assertions.reason: The response provides separate node pools for training (h100-training-pool) and inference (inference-pool) with different configurations

assertions.expectation: Recommends disabling auto-upgrade on GPU training node pools and upgrading manually during scheduled gaps between training runs
assertions.reason: The response shows upgrade settings but doesn't explicitly disable auto-upgrade on GPU training pools or recommend manual upgrades during scheduled gaps

assertions.expectation: Advises configuring training frameworks with checkpointing so jobs can resume after any disruption
assertions.reason: The response includes checkpointing configuration with CHECKPOINT_INTERVAL set to 3600 seconds and CHECKPOINT_PATH to GCS

assertions.expectation: Mentions GPU driver version testing — always validate in staging before applying to production GPU pools
assertions.reason: While the response sets gpuDriverVersion to LATEST, it doesn't mention testing or validating GPU driver versions in staging before production

assertions.expectation: Notes that GPUDirect/RDMA networking has strict GKE version requirements — verify compatibility before upgrading
assertions.reason: The response does not mention GPUDirect/RDMA networking requirements or version compatibility considerations
